description_long: This is a medium-sized, cubic wooden storage box with a stylized, cartoon-like appearance. The box features prominent wood grain textures and is reinforced at the corners with round metallic rivets, giving it a sturdy and robust look. The panels are inset within a thick wooden frame, and the top surface appears to be a removable or liftable lid, matching the rest of the box in material and finish. The wood is a warm, medium brown with lighter streaks, simulating natural wood patterns. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, and the box is entirely enclosed. Its design suggests it is suitable for storing items in garages, workshops, or outdoor urban environments.
description: A stylized, cubic wooden storage box with metal corner rivets and a removable lid, featuring prominent wood grain textures and a warm brown finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wooden panel with vertical grain and four metal rivets at the corners.
description_view_1: This side displays a slightly different wood grain pattern with horizontal lines and the same corner rivets.
description_view_2: Another face with vertical wood grain, similar to view 0 but with subtle differences in the wood pattern.
description_view_3: This side features a more pronounced horizontal wood grain and the same reinforced corners.
